faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Somers, NY?
faqs.answer: Somers residents typically encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, and odorous house ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures common in many Somers homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method.
